## Array
- `map :: (a -> b) -> Array a -> Array b`  <!-- 100 call sites -->
  - `>>> map sqrt (fromLinkedList [1,4,9] :: Array Float)` â†’ `Array [1.0,2.0,3.0]`
- `fromLinkedList :: LinkedList a -> Array a`  <!-- 92 call sites -->
- `empty :: Array a`  <!-- 66 call sites -->
  - `>>> empty :: Array Int` â†’ `Array []`
- `toLinkedList :: Array a -> LinkedList a`  <!-- 59 call sites -->
  - `>>> toLinkedList (fromLinkedList [3,5,8] :: Array Int)` â†’ `[3,5,8]`
- `push :: a -> Array a -> Array a`  <!-- 35 call sites -->
  - `>>> push 3 (fromLinkedList [1,2] :: Array Int)` â†’ `Array [1,2,3]`
- `takeIf :: (a -> Bool) -> Array a -> Array a`  <!-- 32 call sites -->
  - `>>> takeIf Basics.isEven (fromLinkedList [1,2,3,4,5,6] :: Array Int)` â†’ `Array [2,4,6]`
- `isEmpty :: Array a -> Bool`  <!-- 30 call sites -->
  - `>>> isEmpty empty` â†’ `True`
- `length :: Array a -> Int`  <!-- 29 call sites -->
  - `>>> length (Array (Data.Vector.fromList [1,2,3] :: Data.Vector.Vector Int))` â†’ `3`
- `append :: Array a -> Array a -> Array a`  <!-- 24 call sites -->
  - `>>> (repeat 2 42) |> append (repeat 3 81) :: Array Int` â†’ `Array [42,42,81,81,81]`
- `reduce :: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> Array a -> b`  <!-- 23 call sites -->
  - `>>> reduce (+) 0 (repeat 3 5 :: Array Int)` â†’ `15`
